scenario.name: Busy Call Scenario
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@acme.pbx.local SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "SIPp Busy" <sip:acme_test@acme.pbx.local>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@acme.pbx.local> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:acme_test@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Busy Call Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:[service]@acme.pbx.local SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "SIPp Busy" <sip:acme_test@acme.pbx.local>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@acme.pbx.local>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:acme_test@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
